stories.title: 卖掉旧账号
stories.source_range: inspired by early family pressure and account-selling scenes

sentences.chinese: 李贤家里一直没有很多钱。
sentences.english_helper: Lee Hyun's family has not had much money for a long time.

sentences.chinese: 白天，他在加油站工作。
sentences.english_helper: During the day, he works at a gas station.

sentences.chinese: 晚上，他回家以后，还要照顾奶奶和妹妹。
sentences.english_helper: At night, after he goes home, he still has to take care of his grandma and younger sister.

sentences.chinese: 奶奶身体不好，最近常常生病。
sentences.english_helper: His grandma is not in good health and has often been sick lately.

sentences.chinese: 妹妹虽然不说，可是李贤看得出来，她每天都在担心家里的钱。
sentences.english_helper: His younger sister does not say it, but Lee Hyun can tell that she worries about the family's money every day.

sentences.chinese: 李贤自己也很急，可是他不喜欢把“我很难”放在脸上。
sentences.english_helper: Lee Hyun is worried too, but he does not like to show how hard things are on his face.

sentences.chinese: 他总是说“没事”，然后一个人想办法。
sentences.english_helper: He always says, 'It's okay,' and then thinks of a solution by himself.

sentences.chinese: 他还有一个旧游戏账号。
sentences.english_helper: He still has an old game account.

sentences.chinese: 那个账号陪了他很久。
sentences.english_helper: That account has been with him for a long time.

sentences.chinese: 以前他最难过的时候，他常常打开电脑，看着那个账号，心里会安静一点。
sentences.english_helper: When he felt the saddest before, he often opened the computer and felt a little calmer looking at that account.

sentences.chinese: 所以在他心里，那个账号不只是钱，也是他最后一点希望。
sentences.english_helper: So in his heart, that account is not only money, but also his last little bit of hope.

sentences.chinese: 他一直告诉自己，只要这个账号还在，他就不算什么都没有。
sentences.english_helper: He keeps telling himself that as long as the account still exists, he does not count as having nothing.

sentences.chinese: 可是有一天晚上，奶奶又病了。
sentences.english_helper: But one night, his grandma gets sick again.

sentences.chinese: 妹妹小声问他：“明天买药的钱在哪里？”
sentences.english_helper: His younger sister softly asks, 'Where is the money for tomorrow's medicine?'

sentences.chinese: 李贤没有马上回答。
sentences.english_helper: Lee Hyun does not answer right away.

sentences.chinese: 他看着桌子上的卡，又看着房间里的奶奶，心里很乱。
sentences.english_helper: He looks at the card on the table, then at his grandma in the room, and feels very mixed up inside.

sentences.chinese: 一个声音说：“不能卖。
sentences.english_helper: One voice says, 'You cannot sell it.'

sentences.chinese: 卖了以后，你就真的什么都没有了。”
sentences.english_helper: It says, 'If you sell it, then you really will have nothing left.'

sentences.chinese: 另一个声音说：“如果不卖，家里怎么办？”
sentences.english_helper: Another voice says, 'If you do not sell it, what will happen to the family?'

sentences.chinese: 他坐了很久，才慢慢明白，自己一直舍不得的不是游戏本身，而是那个“我还没有输”的感觉。
sentences.english_helper: He sits for a long time and slowly understands that what he cannot let go of is not the game itself, but the feeling that he has not lost yet.

sentences.chinese: 第二天，他去把旧账号卖了，把钱带回家。
sentences.english_helper: The next day, he goes to sell the old account and brings the money home.

sentences.chinese: 奶奶先愣了一下，然后轻轻笑了。
sentences.english_helper: His grandma freezes for a moment first, then smiles softly.

sentences.chinese: 妹妹也终于松了一口气。
sentences.english_helper: His younger sister finally feels relieved too.

sentences.chinese: 李贤心里还是有点空，可是那种空没有让他更怕。
sentences.english_helper: Lee Hyun still feels a little empty, but that emptiness does not make him more afraid.

sentences.chinese: 相反，他第一次觉得自己更稳了。
sentences.english_helper: Instead, for the first time, he feels steadier.

sentences.chinese: 他知道，真正让人安心的，不是手里留着什么东西，而是自己愿意为了家里去做对的事。
sentences.english_helper: He knows that what truly makes a person feel calm is not keeping something in your hand, but being willing to do the right thing for your family.

stories.title: 一直打稻草人的人
stories.source_range: inspired by early training hall scenes

sentences.chinese: 杂草进入皇家之路以后，没有先去找热闹的地方，也没有急着去做简单任务。
sentences.english_helper: After Weed enters Royal Road, he does not first look for lively places and does not hurry to do easy quests.

sentences.chinese: 他一到塞拉堡城，就先走进训练场。
sentences.english_helper: As soon as he arrives in Serabourg, he first walks into the training hall.

sentences.chinese: 别的新手看了一圈，打几下训练稻草人，很快就走了。
sentences.english_helper: Other beginners look around, hit the training scarecrow a few times, and leave quickly.

sentences.chinese: 有人去市场，有人去找队友，还有人笑杂草。
sentences.english_helper: Some people go to the market, some go to find teammates, and some laugh at Weed.

sentences.chinese: 他们问：“你一直打这个木头人，要打到什么时候？”
sentences.english_helper: They ask, 'You keep hitting this wooden man. How long are you going to do that?'

sentences.chinese: 杂草没有回话，只是继续拿着木剑，一下一下地打。
sentences.english_helper: Weed does not answer. He just keeps holding the wooden sword and hitting again and again.

sentences.chinese: 在别人眼里，这很奇怪。
sentences.english_helper: In other people's eyes, this is very strange.

sentences.chinese: 在杂草心里，这却很重要。
sentences.english_helper: But in Weed's heart, this is very important.

sentences.chinese: 他一直有一个想法：自己开始得太晚，钱也不多，运气也不会特别好。
sentences.english_helper: He keeps thinking that he started too late, does not have much money, and will not have especially good luck.

sentences.chinese: 如果不比别人更苦、更久、更能忍，他以后一定还是弱的人。
sentences.english_helper: If he is not more enduring and works longer than others, he will still be weak later.

sentences.chinese: 所以他不肯停。
sentences.english_helper: So he refuses to stop.

sentences.chinese: 手痛了，他继续。
sentences.english_helper: His hands hurt, and he continues.

sentences.chinese: 肚子饿了，他继续。
sentences.english_helper: He gets hungry, and he continues.

sentences.chinese: 天黑了，他还是继续。
sentences.english_helper: It gets dark, and he still continues.

sentences.chinese: 可是打得越久，他心里越乱。
sentences.english_helper: But the longer he keeps hitting, the more confused he feels inside.

sentences.chinese: 他开始想：“我是不是太慢了？”
sentences.english_helper: He starts to think, 'Am I too slow?'

sentences.chinese: 他又想：“我是不是再练也没有用？”
sentences.english_helper: He also thinks, 'Even if I keep training, is it useless?'

sentences.chinese: 教官一直在旁边看。
sentences.english_helper: The instructor keeps watching from the side.

sentences.chinese: 教官没有马上说话。
sentences.english_helper: The instructor does not speak right away.

sentences.chinese: 只在杂草快没有力气的时候，教官问了一句：“你是在练，还是只是在生气？”
sentences.english_helper: Only when Weed is nearly out of strength does the instructor ask, 'Are you training, or are you only being angry?'

sentences.chinese: 这句话让杂草愣住了。
sentences.english_helper: That sentence stuns Weed.

sentences.chinese: 他第一次停下来，看着手里的木剑，又看着前面的稻草人。
sentences.english_helper: For the first time, he stops and looks at the wooden sword in his hand, then at the scarecrow in front of him.

sentences.chinese: 杂草突然明白，一直乱打，不等于真正变强。
sentences.english_helper: Weed suddenly understands that wildly hitting all the time does not mean truly becoming stronger.

sentences.chinese: 他不是在跟稻草人练，而是在跟自己心里的怕打。
sentences.english_helper: He is not really training against the scarecrow. He is fighting the fear inside himself.

sentences.chinese: 从那以后，杂草还是继续练，可是方法变了。
sentences.english_helper: After that, Weed still keeps training, but his method changes.

sentences.chinese: 他先看，再想，然后再打。
sentences.english_helper: He first looks, then thinks, and only then hits.

sentences.chinese: 每一下都更稳，也更安静。
sentences.english_helper: Each strike is steadier and calmer.

sentences.chinese: 没过多久，教官走过来，把一个特别任务交给了他。
sentences.english_helper: Not long later, the instructor walks over and gives him a special quest.

sentences.chinese: 那一刻，杂草才知道，真正让人变强的，不只是吃苦，也是愿意改自己。
sentences.english_helper: At that moment, Weed finally knows that what truly makes a person strong is not only enduring hardship, but also being willing to change yourself.

stories.title: 不想听故事的人
stories.target_level_note: low-level discovery story with a simple internal shift

sentences.chinese: 杂草为了一个关于月光的任务，先去找雕刻店的店主，又去酒馆找吟游诗人，后来还去找旧女仆。
sentences.english_helper: For a quest about moonlight, Weed first goes to the sculpture shop keeper, then to the tavern bard, and later to the old maid.

sentences.chinese: 每个人都只说一点点，没有一个人把话一次说完。
sentences.english_helper: Each person says only a little. No one says everything at once.

sentences.chinese: 杂草本来就不是喜欢听故事的人。
sentences.english_helper: Weed was never a person who liked listening to stories.

sentences.chinese: 他觉得故事太慢，也太远。
sentences.english_helper: He feels stories are too slow and too far away.

sentences.chinese: 故事不能马上变成钱，也不能马上让人变强。
sentences.english_helper: Stories cannot immediately turn into money, and they cannot immediately make a person stronger.

sentences.chinese: 所以他一开始只想快点听完，快点离开。
sentences.english_helper: So at first he only wants to hear it quickly and leave quickly.

sentences.chinese: 可是事情没有那么简单。
sentences.english_helper: But things are not that simple.

sentences.chinese: 店主只告诉他王宫里有一个旧传说。
sentences.english_helper: The shopkeeper only tells him that there is an old legend in the royal palace.

sentences.chinese: 吟游诗人只唱了几句歌。
sentences.english_helper: The bard sings only a few lines.

sentences.chinese: 旧女仆又一直说从前的事。
sentences.english_helper: The old maid keeps talking about things from the past.

sentences.chinese: 杂草越听越烦，差一点就想走。
sentences.english_helper: The more Weed listens, the more annoyed he gets, and he almost wants to leave.

sentences.chinese: 他心里一直有一个想法：只有马上有用的东西，才值得花时间。
sentences.english_helper: He keeps thinking that only things that are useful right away are worth spending time on.

sentences.chinese: 听这些旧话，太浪费时间了。
sentences.english_helper: Listening to all these old words is too much of a waste of time.

sentences.chinese: 但当他真的站起来准备离开时，他忽然想到自己在训练场的日子。
sentences.english_helper: But when he really stands up to leave, he suddenly thinks about his days in the training hall.

sentences.chinese: 那时候，别人也觉得打稻草人没有用。
sentences.english_helper: At that time, other people also thought hitting the scarecrow was useless.

sentences.chinese: 可是正是那些看起来没用的时间，让他后来拿到了任务。
sentences.english_helper: But it was exactly that seemingly useless time that later got him the quest.

sentences.chinese: 想到这里，他又坐下来了。
sentences.english_helper: When he thinks of this, he sits back down.

sentences.chinese: 这一次，他不再只想“快点结束”，而是开始认真听，认真问，也认真把每个人的话放在一起想。
sentences.english_helper: This time, he no longer only wants it to end quickly. He starts to listen carefully, ask carefully, and think carefully about everyone's words together.

sentences.chinese: 慢慢地，一条线在他眼前清楚起来。
sentences.english_helper: Slowly, one line becomes clear in front of him.

sentences.chinese: 月光不是普通的名字，扎哈布也不是普通的雕刻家。
sentences.english_helper: Moonlight is not an ordinary name, and Zahab is not an ordinary sculptor.

sentences.chinese: 那份约定、那个夜晚、那把像剑一样的雕刻刀，原来都连在一起。
sentences.english_helper: That promise, that night, and that sculpting knife like a sword all turn out to be connected.

sentences.chinese: 最后，杂草得到了月光雕刻师的路。
sentences.english_helper: In the end, Weed finds the path of the Moonlight Sculptor.

sentences.chinese: 以前的他也许会因为怕麻烦而转身就走，这一次他却没有。
sentences.english_helper: In the past, he might have turned around and left because he feared trouble, but this time he does not.

sentences.chinese: 他终于明白，有些最好的东西，不会大声叫你过去。
sentences.english_helper: He finally understands that some of the best things do not loudly call you over.

sentences.chinese: 你要先安静下来，才会真的听见。
sentences.english_helper: You have to become quiet first before you can really hear.
